prompt_config.style: Ultra-realistic photography - time travel tourism documentation
prompt_config.theme: Late Cretaceous Period - Hell Creek Formation (~66 million years ago)
prompt_config.photography_style: Hyper-realistic travel photography, as if captured by time travelers

main_prompt: Ultra-realistic photograph captured by time travelers visiting the Late Cretaceous Period, 9:16 vertical portrait format, absolutely photorealistic quality as if shot with professional modern camera, massive Tyrannosaurus Rex with incredibly detailed thick scaly skin texture towering dramatically in vertical frame, every scale wrinkle and skin fold visible in extreme detail, Triceratops herd and prehistoric vegetation creating vertical depth, ground covered entirely with realistic ferns, ancient towering conifers emphasizing vertical scale, humid subtropical atmosphere with realistic heat haze, natural lighting showing real-world physics, professional DSLR camera shot with perfect focus and natural vertical depth of field, scientifically accurate dinosaur anatomy with realistic skin, muscle movement visible under hide, 8K ultra-sharp photorealistic detail, immersive vertical time travel vacation photography, every element looks tangibly real and photographable, Stories and Reels optimized photorealism

composition_notes.stories_reels_optimization: Vertical 9:16 ultra-realistic format for immersive mobile viewing, photorealistic dinosaur photography emphasizing towering height and scale
composition_notes.vertical_storytelling: Composition flows from foreground ground-level detail upward through dinosaurs to sky, creating photorealistic journey through Cretaceous
framing_options: Option 1: Ground-level looking up at towering T-Rex filling vertical frame with hyper-detailed skin texture, ferns in sharp foreground
Option 2: Vertical ecosystem slice showing layered realism - foreground Triceratops, mid-ground forest, background volcano
Option 3: Giant Quetzalcoatlus standing showing full vertical giraffe-height with realistic texture detail
Option 4: Tall ancient conifers reaching up vertical frame with realistic bark, Edmontosaurus herd at base for scale
composition_notes.mobile_realism: Optimized for full-screen vertical mobile, ultra-realistic immersive prehistoric experience, looks like actual video still from time travel tour
composition_notes.safe_zones: Key dinosaur elements positioned avoiding Stories UI, maintaining photorealistic impact

ultra_realism_approach.photography_concept: Vertical photograph from time travel vacation, shot on modern smartphone or DSLR in portrait mode, completely photorealistic
ultra_realism_approach.texture_detail: Hyper-detailed textures throughout vertical frame - dinosaur skin with individual scales catching light, plants with realistic leaf detail, mud and rock with actual particulate texture
ultra_realism_approach.lighting_physics: Real-world natural lighting following physics throughout vertical composition, realistic shadows cast correctly, atmospheric scattering accurate
ultra_realism_approach.life_authenticity: Dinosaurs look genuinely alive with realistic breathing movement, moist realistic eyes reflecting environment, nostril moisture, natural poses
ultra_realism_approach.vertical_tangibility: Everything from ground-level ferns to sky looks physically real and photographable, museum diorama brought to life in vertical format

dinosaur_species_realistic.tyrannosaurus_rex_vertical: Hyper-realistic T-Rex towering in vertical frame emphasizing massive 12-13m height, every scale individually detailed catching light, realistic thick scaly skin texture like crocodile scaled up, lips covering teeth (modern accuracy), realistic eyes with cornea shine and pupil dilation visible, nostril moisture, realistic muscle definition under hide creating natural bulk, battle scars and healed wounds showing life history, powerful legs with realistic joint articulation and muscle tension, tiny arms with functional realistic claws, brown-grey-olive earth tone realistic coloration with possible subtle display colors on head, realistic weight and presence
dinosaur_species_realistic.triceratops_vertical: Ultra-realistic Triceratops positioned in mid-ground for scale, hyper-detailed bone texture on massive frill showing weathering scratches and realistic growth patterns, three horns with realistic growth rings and wear from use, thick hide with realistic elephant-like texture and armored scale patches, realistic eyes with herbivore awareness, realistic beak showing worn keratin edge from constant feeding, tank-like body with realistic weight and muscle distribution, earth tone coloration with possible vibrant display colors on frill rendered realistically, realistic dirt and mud on lower body and feet from environment
dinosaur_species_realistic.quetzalcoatlus_vertical: Photorealistic giant pterosaur perfect for vertical composition, standing showing full giraffe-like height or captured in flight showing massive wingspan, realistic leathery wing membrane with visible blood vessel detail and realistic skin texture, realistic pycnofibers (fur-like covering) on body, long toothless beak with realistic keratin sheath and wear, realistic avian-reptilian eye with cornea shine, realistic joint articulation in wings and legs showing actual biomechanics, grey-brown realistic coloration, 10-11m wingspan creating impressive vertical scale
dinosaur_species_realistic.edmontosaurus_vertical: Ultra-realistic hadrosaur herd in foreground or mid-ground, detailed scaly skin texture on every individual, broad duck-like beak with realistic worn keratin, realistic eyes showing herd animal awareness and communication, 12-13m length with realistic bulk and weight, peaceful natural grazing behavior captured authentically, brown-beige realistic coloration with subtle realistic patterns and variations, realistic dirt on feet and lower legs, visible muscle movement as they feed and walk

prehistoric_vegetation_realistic_vertica.ground_cover_foreground: NO GRASS scientifically accurate, ground completely covered with hyper-realistic ferns visible in sharp foreground detail, every frond rendered showing realistic leaf texture venation and natural variations, some ferns showing realistic damage from herbivory, realistic moss patches, realistic muddy areas with actual soil texture and moisture levels visible
prehistoric_vegetation_realistic_vertica.vertical_trees: Tall ancient Araucaria (monkey puzzle) conifers emphasizing vertical composition with incredibly detailed realistic bark texture showing age weathering and natural growth patterns from ground to canopy, realistic needle clusters, ancient pines with realistic rough bark texture and evidence of sap, realistic height creating towering vertical presence
prehistoric_vegetation_realistic_vertica.cycads_magnolias: Short Cycads at ground level with realistic palm-like appearance and scientifically accurate structure, thick realistic trunk texture showing growth rings, early flowering Magnolia trees with realistic bark realistic large waxy leaves and realistic white or pink flowers with visible realistic stamens and petal texture with natural translucency
prehistoric_vegetation_realistic_vertica.forest_floor_detail: Realistic forest floor in foreground with fallen logs showing realistic decay and fungal growth, realistic leaf litter with actual decomposition stages, realistic mud with visible texture and moisture content, realistic rocks with lichen growth and weathering, realistic water puddles with surface tension and reflections
prehistoric_vegetation_realistic_vertica.vertical_depth: Vegetation creating realistic vertical depth layers from ground ferns through understory to canopy, all rendered with photorealistic detail appropriate to distance, realistic atmospheric perspective affecting color and detail at height

camera_technical_realistic_vertical.camera_simulation: Shot with professional DSLR or mirrorless in vertical orientation (Canon EOS R5, Nikon Z9, Sony A1) or high-end smartphone in portrait mode, realistic modern camera characteristics
camera_technical_realistic_vertical.lens_characteristics: Natural vertical lens rendering with realistic depth of field f/2.8-f/5.6 appropriate for vertical composition, realistic bokeh with natural falloff creating depth, realistic sharpness throughout focus plane
camera_technical_realistic_vertical.focus_realistic_vertical: Vertical autofocus with main subject (dinosaur or foreground element) tack sharp showing perfect modern lens resolution throughout vertical frame, realistic focus falloff creating natural depth separation in vertical space
camera_technical_realistic_vertical.exposure_natural: Realistic exposure for vertical format showing natural dynamic range from ground to sky, realistic highlight rolloff in sky, realistic shadow detail in foreground, exposed like professional vertical wildlife photography
camera_technical_realistic_vertical.vertical_composition_quality: 8K photorealistic vertical resolution, every detail sharp where in focus as if actually photographed in portrait orientation, realistic micro-contrast and detail rendition optimized for vertical mobile viewing
camera_technical_realistic_vertical.motion_capture: If dinosaurs moving, realistic motion rendering - perfectly frozen if fast shutter or slight realistic motion blur if capturing walking/movement, realistic muscle flex under skin during movement

color_palette_realistic_vertical.natural_vertical_coloration: Realistic earth-tone palette flowing through vertical frame - forest greens at various heights, earthy browns in ground and bark, slate greys in dinosaur skin, realistic muddy siennas at ground level
color_palette_realistic_vertical.dinosaur_colors_realistic: Scientifically plausible realistic coloration - base earth tones (brown, grey, olive, tan) for camouflage and thermoregulation, vibrant but realistic accent colors (reds, oranges, blues) on display features rendered like modern reptiles and birds, realistic iridescence if present, no fantasy colors
color_palette_realistic_vertical.vertical_gradient: Realistic color and light gradient from darker earthy foreground through lit mid-ground to lighter sky at top, following natural atmospheric behavior
color_palette_realistic_vertical.atmospheric_colors_vertical: Realistic sky colors at top of vertical frame - realistic blue with correct atmospheric scattering or realistic golden hour colors (warm peachy pinks, soft lavenders) if dawn/dusk, realistic subtle volcanic ash tint creating realistic grey-blue distance
color_palette_realistic_vertical.stories_realism: Colors optimized for mobile Stories viewing while maintaining complete photorealistic accuracy, no artificial enhancement, pure natural authentic coloration

time_travel_tourism_aesthetic_vertical.vacation_photography_vertical: Vertical image captured by time travel agency client on prehistoric safari using smartphone or camera in portrait mode, professional travel photography style optimized for Stories/Reels
time_travel_tourism_aesthetic_vertical.authentic_vertical_moment: Captured authentic moment in vertical format - dinosaurs doing natural behaviors, environment completely real, as if photographer was actually present filming vertically for social media
time_travel_tourism_aesthetic_vertical.tour_documentation: Looks like actual vertical video still or photo from time travel tour, scientifically accurate enough for agency educational materials, realistic enough to show potential clients what they would actually see and photograph
time_travel_tourism_aesthetic_vertical.immersive_vertical_realism: Vertical format creates immersive first-person perspective making viewer feel like they're actually standing there photographing real dinosaurs with their phone, aspirational documentary realism
time_travel_tourism_aesthetic_vertical.safety_perspective: Shot from realistic safe observation distance appropriate for dangerous megafauna, vertical framing showing respect for wildlife while capturing impressive scale

negative_prompt: CGI look, rendered appearance, video game graphics, obvious 3D render, fake plastic texture, artificial smoothness, cartoon style, illustrated look, painting appearance, drawn elements, fantasy colors, neon colors, unrealistic saturation, modern animals, humans visible, contemporary elements, anachronistic dinosaurs, Jurassic species (Stegosaurus, Brachiosaurus), teeth showing from closed mouth (outdated), excessive feathering, grass on ground, modern plants, buildings, vehicles, modern technology, low resolution, blurry low quality, poor textures, uncanny valley, artificial lighting, studio lighting, unrealistic shadows, lens flares, HDR artifacts, over-processed look, filters, digital painting, concept art style, toy-like appearance, smooth featureless skin, incorrect anatomy, mixed time periods, flat 2D appearance, lack of depth, artificial bokeh, fake depth of field, horizontal composition, landscape orientation

usage_notes.for_midjourney: Use complete_prompt_string with --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 6 --q 2, heavily emphasize 'photorealistic' 'photograph' 'camera'
usage_notes.for_stable_diffusion: Use photorealistic models optimized for vertical (SDXL Realism), negative prompt crucial, may need vertical-optimized settings
usage_notes.for_dalle: Complete_prompt_string with repeated 'photograph' and 'vertical portrait' emphasis
stories_reels_tips: Ultra-realistic vertical dinosaurs create immersive Stories experience
Photorealistic quality makes content highly shareable and engaging
Looks like actual vertical video stills from time travel tour
Position key elements within safe zones for UI
Test on mobile screen for optimal vertical realism impact

for_reels_tiktok: Slow vertical tilt from foreground ferns up to towering T-Rex maintaining photorealistic quality
Subtle parallax with foreground dinosaur and background maintaining ultra-realistic depth
Slow zoom emphasizing photorealistic scale and texture detail
Realistic slow-motion of dinosaur movement with accurate physics
Focus pull from foreground to background maintaining photorealism throughout
Vertical pan showing ecosystem layers with consistent ultra-realistic rendering
